inputs.label: Consultant Daily Rate
inputs.businessContext: The base daily rate charged by the consultant.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to cover administrative and operational overhead costs.

inputs.label: Profit Margin Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Target net profit margin desired on top of all costs.

inputs.label: Days Worked
inputs.businessContext: Total number of working days for the consulting engagement.

inputs.label: Additional Expenses
inputs.businessContext: Any extra reimbursable expenses such as travel, accommodation, or materials.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: VAT or other applicable consumption tax rate on the final invoice amount.
